meaning: n.群众煽动,散布谣言,煽动行为
examples: So demagoguery it is and demagoguery it will be.
Over the past year the demagoguery has got the upper hand.
Saying that isn’t demagoguery, it’s just pointing out the truth.
Somehow, amidst all the GOP demagoguery, a bit of very sound policy managed to get through.
But frequently, these kinds of trials only spark nostalgic civil rights demagoguery and sloganeering.
